{"problem_standardized_math":"Using assumptions similar to those used to derive the forward-difference estimate \\(\\epsilon = \\sqrt{u}\\) in (8.6), show that for the central-difference formula a suitable choice of the perturbation is \\(\\epsilon = u^{1/3}\\), and that when the computed values of \\(f\\) contain roundoff errors of size \\(u\\), the accuracy attainable by this formula is approximately \\(u^{2/3}\\)."}
